summary: Completed frontend-only testing of AR Ledger module. All 4 tabs (Invoices, Customers, Aging Report, Rekonsiliasi) render correctly. CRITICAL: Rekonsiliasi tab switching issue is FIXED - tab switches properly and reconciliation statement displays all expected data (Saldo Awal, Invoice Diterbitkan, Pembayaran Diterima, Saldo Akhir). Regression smoke tests (Journals, AP Aging, Balance Sheet) all pass without errors.
passed_tests: AR Ledger page loads without white-screen or errors
Invoices tab: displays 14 invoices with status badges (Draft, Terkirim, Sebagian), KPI strip shows Total Invoice 14
Customers tab: displays 27 customers including expected names (PT Mitra Boga Nusantara, CV Sentosa Catering, Hotel Grand Menara)
Aging Report tab: displays aging buckets (Belum JT, 1-30 Hari, 31-60 Hari, 61-90 Hari, >90 Hari) and Total Outstanding Rp 187.378.000
Aging Report tab: Per Customer breakdown table renders correctly
Rekonsiliasi tab: CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED - tab switches to active state (data-state='active')

Rekonsiliasi tab: reconciliation statement card renders with all expected rows (Saldo Awal: Rp 93.740.000, Invoice Diterbitkan: Rp 102.026.000, Pembayaran Diterima: Rp 8.388.000, Saldo Akhir: Rp 187.378.000)
Regression: Finance > Journals page loads without errors
Regression: Finance > AP Aging page loads without errors
Regression: Finance > Balance Sheet loads without errors and shows balanced state (Assets Rp 1.609.275.000 = Liabilities+Equity Rp 1.497.008.255 + Net Income Rp 1.590.879.000)
